iterations.theme: Revuto: Revolutionizing Subscription Management with Web3 Technology and Tokenomics
iterations.reason_for_cut: The entire podcast is a continuous discussion about Revuto, its features, business model, and tokenomics, naturally concluding with the end of the interview.

chapters.topic: Introduction to Revuto and Vedran Vukman
What is Revuto? (Fintech app, subscription management, Web2 to Web3 transition)
The Genesis of Revuto: Solving Personal Subscription Problems
How Revuto Works: Virtual Cards, Blocking Payments, and Subscription NFTs
Current Status and Future Plans: Waiting for the Bull Market
The Massive Potential of the Subscription Economy
Revuto's Unique Position: No Direct Competition, Comparison with Revolut
The 'Lifetime Subscription' NFTs: Business Rationale and Functionality
Revuto's Business Model: Revenue Streams, Micro-lending, and Premium Features
The Role of Blockchain and Tokenomics in Revuto's Vision
The ICO Journey: Funding, Community, and Token Distribution
Exchange Listings and Future Token Value Expectations
Expanding Beyond Subscriptions: Physical Cards and Utility Bills
